ddls:
CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the business unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "text1" TEXT /* First textual property */,
  "text2" TEXT /* Second textual property */,
  "numerical1" REAL /* First numerical property (float) */,
  "numerical2" INTEGER /* Second numerical property (integer) */,
  "numerical3" REAL /* Third numerical property (float) */,
  "numerical1_str" TEXT /* First numerical property as a string */,
  "numerical2_str" TEXT /* Second numerical property as a string */,
  "numerical3_str" TEXT /* Third numerical property as a string */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the business_units table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_sets" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category set */,
  "category_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the category set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category set */,
  "foo" REAL /* Value for category 'foo' */,
  "bar" REAL /* Value for category 'bar' */,
  "zing" REAL /* Value for category 'zing' */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "image_with_ext" TEXT /* Image file name with extension */,
  "image_full_path" TEXT /* Full path to the image file */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_categories" (
  "data_point_id" TEXT /* ID of the data point */,
  "category_set_id" TEXT /* ID of the category set */,
  "category_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the category set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id", "category_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_images" (
  "data_point_id" TEXT /* ID of the data point */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id", "image_id")
)
